_note: Batch inference config. Inherits model and tokenizer from latest training run. Run: python src/infer.py configs/infer.json

meta.description: Batch inference — 3 TinyStories prompts, top-k sampling

source._note: run_id: null = auto-detect latest training run. checkpoint: best = prefer best.safetensors.

generation._note: top_k sampling at temperature 0.8. Stops on end-of-story token or double newline.

input._note: batch mode: interactive=false, evals=false. prompts are encoded and fed to model.generate().
prompts: Deep in the forest there lived
